Install dependencies for one folder-backed or registry study

Source: R/maintainer_dependencies.R
install_study_dependencies.Rd

Maintainer setup only. Installs declared R CRAN packages, Python pip packages, and runs study Stata install scripts (install_stata_deps.do) once. Does not build display artifacts — use build_study_artifacts() for that.

Usage

install_study_dependencies(
  location,
  registry_root = NULL,
  repo = NULL,
  folder = NULL
)

Arguments

location

Study DOI, registry handle, local path, or GitHub slug.

registry_root

Optional registry checkout for monorepo dev.

repo, folder

Optional registry row hints.

Value

Invisibly TRUE on success.

Details

Live Run and Shiny probe dependencies only; call this function (or install_registry_dependencies()) when onboarding a machine.

See also

check_study_compatibility(), build_study_artifacts(), install_registry_dependencies()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
install_study_dependencies("10.1017/S0003055426101749")
install_study_dependencies("path/to/study-repo")
} # }

On this page
